final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: architectural-concept
Asset type: concept art, digital illustration
Primary request: futuristic floating building with streamlined white architecture, surrounded by drones and holographic projections, clean energy facilities, sustainable urban development vision
Scene/backdrop: sky cityscape, floating platforms, renewable energy infrastructure, atmospheric clouds
Subject: sleek white streamlined building suspended in mid-air, futuristic architecture with smooth curves
Style/medium: digital concept art, futuristic architectural visualization, sci-fi illustration
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, low angle looking up at floating structure
Lighting/mood: soft ambient daylight with subtle tech glow, optimistic and aspirational mood
Color palette: clean white architecture, sky blue gradients, soft cyan holographic accents, silver drones
Materials/textures: smooth matte white surfaces, translucent holographic displays, metallic drone bodies
Constraints: maintain floating effect with no visible support, emphasize sustainable energy elements
Avoid: dark dystopian atmosphere, cluttered composition, deformed architecture, watermark
